scope: Doctrine screen per-turn staff intelligence directive, recon preview, and next strategic-turn intel preparation
mobileQa: skipped: mobile is no longer a current target

steps: Reset campaign and open Camp -> Doctrine.
Verify initial staff directive board shows 標準参謀整理 and all directive choices.
Verify Doctrine support summary changes to 小任務+8 and 敵情分析 +1 / 教訓値+4.
Assign 東方辺境猟兵隊 and ケラー to the recon side operation.
Verify recon preview shows 精密偵察92 and 参謀支援+8.
Enter Deployment, start the mandatory battle, withdraw, apply After Action, and return to the strategic map.
Verify turn 2 strategic generation uses the selected directive.

observedSignals.nextTurnPreparationMessage: 敵情分析班が戦区情報を整理。初期敵情+2、教訓値4。
observedSignals.nextTurnMainEnemyLabel: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 偵察照合済み / 群集3-5 / 銃兵2-4 / 突破体1-3
